product.title: [Silver] 7-Day Tour across Hawaii Oahu, Maui, and Hawaii Islands

raw.productName: [Silver] 7-Day Tour across Hawaii Oahu, Maui, and Hawaii Islands
raw.productSpecial:
• Discover the highlights of downtown Honolulu!
  • Tour the big and small circles of Oahu to experience the true authentic island style of touch! 
  • Visit the lush Maui Tropical Plantation, and walk on the one of the best beaches to appreciate beautiful sea view!
  • Explore the Richardson Black Beach in Kahilo, the beautiful Rainbow Falls, and visit the world natural heritage site at the Hawaii Volcanoes National Park. 
  • Enjoy complimentary inter-island air tickets which saves you the trouble of purchasing tickets.
raw.departureDate:
Daily departure
For stays at the Honolulu Hotel during the period 07/01/2026-07/31/2026, a peak season surcharge of $45 per room per night will be imposed (the surcharge is bundled with value-added services).
For stays at the Honolulu Hotel during the period 08/01/2026-08/15/2026, a peak season surcharge of $25 per room per night will be imposed (the surcharge is bundled with value-added services).
Minimum of 2 guests is required to be operated.

highlights.html:
• Discover the highlights of downtown Honolulu!
  • Tour the big and small circles of Oahu to experience the true authentic island style of touch! 
  • Visit the lush Maui Tropical Plantation, and walk on the one of the best beaches to appreciate beautiful sea view!
  • Explore the Richardson Black Beach in Kahilo, the beautiful Rainbow Falls, and visit the world natural heritage site at the Hawaii Volcanoes National Park. 
  • Enjoy complimentary inter-island air tickets which saves you the trouble of purchasing tickets.
highlights.text:
- Discover the highlights of downtown Honolulu!

- Tour the big and small circles of Oahu to experience the true authentic island style of touch! 

- Visit the lush Maui Tropical Plantation, and walk on the one of the best beaches to appreciate beautiful sea view!

- Explore the Richardson Black Beach in Kahilo, the beautiful Rainbow Falls, and visit the world natural heritage site at the Hawaii Volcanoes National Park. 

- Enjoy complimentary inter-island air tickets which saves you the trouble of purchasing tickets.

departure.html:
Daily departure
For stays at the Honolulu Hotel during the period 07/01/2026-07/31/2026, a peak season surcharge of $45 per room per night will be imposed (the surcharge is bundled with value-added services).
For stays at the Honolulu Hotel during the period 08/01/2026-08/15/2026, a peak season surcharge of $25 per room per night will be imposed (the surcharge is bundled with value-added services).
Minimum of 2 guests is required to be operated.

Daily departure

For stays at the Honolulu Hotel during the period 08/01/2026-08/15/2026, a peak season surcharge of $25 per room per night will be imposed (the surcharge is bundled with value-added services).
Minimum of 2 guests is required to be operated.

pickup.name: Daniel K. Inouye International Airport (HNL)
pickup.description:
Free airport pick-up time on the day of the tour: 07:00-21:59, this is the meeting time between guests and the tour guide. The same order only provides one free pick-up service within the pick-up time.
No pick-up service is provided at 22:00-04:59(All times are local time in Hawaii).

dropoff.name: Daniel K. Inouye International Airport (HNL)
dropoff.description: The free airport shuttle service at Honolulu International Airport (HNL) is from 05:30-21:30. It is recommended that you book a flight that departs after 08:30 on the same day.

shopify_mapping.title: [Silver] 7-Day Tour across Hawaii Oahu, Maui, and Hawaii Islands
shopify_mapping.bodyHtml:
Highlights

  • Discover the highlights of downtown Honolulu!
  • Tour the big and small circles of Oahu to experience the true authentic island style of touch! 
  • Visit the lush Maui Tropical Plantation, and walk on the one of the best beaches to appreciate beautiful sea view!
  • Explore the Richardson Black Beach in Kahilo, the beautiful Rainbow Falls, and visit the world natural heritage site at the Hawaii Volcanoes National Park. 
  • Enjoy complimentary inter-island air tickets which saves you the trouble of purchasing tickets.

Departure Date

Daily departure
For stays at the Honolulu Hotel during the period 07/01/2026-07/31/2026, a peak season surcharge of $45 per room per night will be imposed (the surcharge is bundled with value-added services).
For stays at the Honolulu Hotel during the period 08/01/2026-08/15/2026, a peak season surcharge of $25 per room per night will be imposed (the surcharge is bundled with value-added services).
Minimum of 2 guests is required to be operated.
